content: {"assessment": "We have thoroughly investigated the relationship between detection method and observed planet properties. The evidence clearly shows that Transit-detected planets cluster at short periods and small radii, while RV and Imaging fill complementary parameter space. After controlling for these biases, a genuine radius gap persists across methods.", "next_move": "SYNTHESIZE", "rationale": "We have sufficient evidence from multiple angles to draw a conclusion. Time to synthesize findings into a coherent narrative.", "worker_instruction": "Produce a final synthesis summarizing: (1) how detection methods create selection effects in this dataset, (2) the evidence for a real radius gap vs observational artifact, and (3) what additional data would strengthen or weaken this conclusion. Reference specific numbers from our analysis.", "status": "DONE"}
